conditions.displayName: A structured generation error was logged

conditionMatchedLog.filter: resource.type="cloud_run_revision" AND resource.labels.service_name="wonybananabot" AND severity>=ERROR AND jsonPayload.component="wonybananabot" AND jsonPayload.event=~"^generation\.(image\.failed|video\.(timeout|poll_failed)|request\.failed|task\.enqueue_failed)$"

documentation.content: A generation request, image job, video job, poll, or task enqueue failed. Search the event and jobId fields in Cloud Logging.
